tools.name: Percentage Calculator
tools.description: Calculate percentages, increases, decreases, and discounts instantly. Perfect for tips, tax, markups, and financial planning.

tools.name: Image Compressor
tools.description: Compress PNG, JPEG, and WebP images up to 80% without losing quality. Reduce file size instantly for web, email, and storage.

tools.name: Unit Converter
tools.description: Convert length, weight, temperature, volume, speed, area and time instantly. cm to inches, kg to lbs, Celsius to Fahrenheit and hundreds more.

tools.name: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON instantly. Beautify messy JSON, check for syntax errors, and compress for production.

tools.name: Word Unscrambler
tools.description: Find all possible words from scrambled letters. Perfect for Scrabble, Wordle, word games, and solving letter puzzles instantly.

tools.name: Base64 Encoder
tools.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings instantly. Convert text to Base64 and back—essential for APIs, emails, and data encoding.

tools.name: URL Encoder
tools.description: Encode and decode URLs instantly. Convert special characters to URL-safe format for APIs, query strings, and web development.

tools.name: Password Generator
tools.description: Generate strong, random passwords instantly. Customize length, uppercase, numbers, and symbols for maximum security.

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate unique UUIDs (v4) instantly. Perfect for database IDs, API keys, session tokens, and system identifiers.

tools.name: Markdown to HTML
tools.description: Convert Markdown to HTML instantly. Write in Markdown, get clean HTML—perfect for blogging, documentation, and content creation.

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Generate QR codes from text or URLs instantly. Download as PNG for print, web, or mobile—perfect for marketing and tracking.

tools.name: Word Counter
tools.description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, and reading time instantly. Includes a character limit checker for tweets, LinkedIn, and more.

tools.name: AI Email Writer
tools.description: Write professional emails instantly with AI. Draft cold outreach, follow-ups, and business emails—free tier includes 5 emails/week.

tools.name: Content Repurposer
tools.description: Turn one blog post into Twitter threads, LinkedIn posts, and email newsletters. Repurpose content in seconds—free tier includes 1 post/week.

tools.name: AI Summarizer
tools.description: Summarize articles, PDFs, and videos instantly. Get key points in seconds—free tier includes 3 summaries/week.

tools.name: Meditation Timer
tools.description: Free meditation timer with ambient sounds. Choose duration, background sounds, and track your sessions. 100% private—runs on your device.
